3337450.name: Modern Start Menu
3337450.description:
Enhance your Windows experience with Modern Start Menu, the ultra-fast and fully customizable start menu!

Modern Start Menu combines all the essential features of the classic Windows start menu with powerful tools that make a difference: a volume mixer, a battery indicator, performance and temperature monitors, a Steam game launcher, a mini task manager, and much more.

A faster and smarter search: Find your files and applications in an instant with an optimized search engine, far more efficient than the default Windows start menu. Modern Start Menu goes even further by directly integrating your Steam library, making your games accessible in seconds, with no hassle.

Personalization: Freely customize its appearance, size, position, and functionality to create an experience that fits your style.

No risk to your system: Modern Start Menu installs and operates without modifying any Windows system files.
